chapter_title.en: Chapter 52 – Inheritance of the son of the cursed mother (by her husband)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/242)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/242)
text: كَانَ عَلِيٌّ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِذَا مَاتَ ابْنُ الْمُلَاعَنَةِ وَ لَهُ إِخْوَةٌ قُسِمَ مَالُهُ عَلَى سِهَامِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazal Bin Shazaan, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Sayf Bin Umeyra, from Mansour,

From Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Ali<sup>asws</sup> was saying: ‘When a son of the mother cursed by her husband dies, and for him are brothers, his wealth would be distributed upon the (legislated) shares of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Sayf ibn ’Am/rah from Mansur who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin would say if the child of Mula‘anah dies and has brothers the legacy is distributed among them according to the shares ordained by Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious.’”
